description_long: This is a beige, four-door sedan with a classic boxy design reminiscent of mid-to-late 20th-century European cars. The car features a flat front grille with two round headlights on each side, a simple black bumper, and a hood with two small vents. The side profile reveals black trim around the windows, flush door handles, and circular hubcaps on the wheels. The rear of the car is equipped with rectangular taillights, a black bumper, and a trunk with a subtle lip. The windows are tinted dark, and the overall finish is matte with minimal ornamentation, suggesting a utilitarian yet iconic urban vehicle.
description: A beige, boxy four-door sedan with round headlights, rectangular taillights, and a matte finish, evoking a classic European style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat grille, dual round headlights, black bumper, and hood vents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, black window trim, and circular hubcaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying rectangular taillights, black bumper, and the trunk area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, window trim, and wheels.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights on each side, simple and classic arrangement
